articles.author: Russell Brandom
articles.title: Adaption aims big with AutoScientist, an AI tool that helps models train themselves - TechCrunch
articles.description: Adaption's new AutoScientist tool is designed to let models adapt to specific capabilities quickly through an automated approach to conventional fine-tuning.
articles.content: For years, AI researchers have anticipated the moment when AI systems will be able to improve themselves better than humans could. With investors pouring money into a new generation of research-drive… [+2251 chars]
